sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁתּמה אשׁתּמוע אשׁתּמע

Transliteration: 'eshtemôa‛ 'eshtemôa‛ 'eshtemôh

Phonetic: esh-tem-o'-ah

BDB Definition:

Eshtemoh = "I shall cause my own ruin: fire of astonishment: I shall soar aloft"
  1. a Levitical city in Judah
  2. a man of Judah

Origin: from H8085 (in the sense of obedience)

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name
